text.autoconfig.openziti.title: OpenZiti MC
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.identity: Path to your enrolled OpenZiti identity .json (a zrok environment identity works too).
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.serverEn: Host your server over OpenZiti. Off = client-only (you can still join others).
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.serviceN: Service name to bind on (or a zrok share token). Used only when the server is enabled above.
